arts.ttl: Bournemouth 1-1 West Ham: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Unal rescues Cherries with stunning free-kick
arts.sum: Bournemouth's Enes Unal scores a stunning 90th-minute free-kick to rescue a point in Monday's Premier League home clash against West Ham United.

arts.ttl: Astonishing late drama as Bournemouth and West Ham share points
arts.sum: Bournemouth 1-1 West Ham: Enes Uanl’s stunning free-kick cancelled out Lucas Paqueta’s penalty

arts.ttl: West Ham share points with Bournemouth after late drama on England's south coast
arts.sum: Enes Ünal scored a superb free kick in the last minute of normal time to rescue a point for Bournemouth in a 1-1 home draw against West Ham in the Premier League on Monday. “Credit to him, big moment, especially the reaction as well, I thought the boys were brilliant,” Bournemouth forward Ryan Christie told broadcaster Sky.

arts.ttl: Enes Unal nets sensational last-gasp free-kick as Bournemouth earn West Ham draw
arts.sum: Lucas Paqueta’s contentious penalty looked to have snatched victory for the Hammers, three minutes from time before Enes Unal struck.

arts.ttl: Enes Unal nets sensational last-gasp free-kick as Bournemouth earn West Ham draw
arts.sum: Lucas Paqueta’s contentious penalty looked to have snatched victory for the Hammers, three minutes from time before Enes Unal struck.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth v West Ham team news: Coufal in for Emerson
arts.sum: Kick-off at the Vitality is at 20:00 GMT The post Bournemouth v West Ham team news: Coufal in for Emerson appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth v West Ham: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Get in touch! You can email Michael here 4 min: Coufal, who has never scored for West Ham, gets the better of Kerkez on the right. The Czech canters into the Bournemouth area but the angle is tight and the right black fluffs his lines, skewing a shot high and wide. 2 min: Kerkez, who has recently been linked with a move to Manchester United and Liverpool, makes one of those trademark underlaps and gets to the byline, but it’s a good block from Mavropanos to clear the danger. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Coufal and Paquetá return at AFC Bournemouth
arts.sum: On the bench will be goalkeeper Alphonse Areola, young defenders Ollie Scarles and Kaelan Casey, midfielders Andy Irving, Lewis Orford and Luis Guilherme, winger Summerville and strikers Danny Ings and Niclas Füllkrug. Subs: Areola (GK), Scarles, Casey, Orford, Irving, Luis Guilherme, Summerville, Ings, Füllkrug
